title: Oreopanax guatemalensis
taxonomy: Oreopanax guatemalensis is classified within the family Araliaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the ginseng or ivy family. This family consists of about 68 genera and 1,600 species. Oreopanax guatemalensis is specifically a member of the genus Oreopanax, which comprises approximately 30 species of flowering plants. The genus Oreopanax is native to Central and South America, and its species are known for their diverse range of habitats. Oreopanax guatemalensis is a particular species native to Guatemala, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and geographical distribution.
